# TaskHub - Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
TaskHub is a comprehensive task and documentation management app designed for software engineering team leads. It features project-based task organization, automatic link detection, file persistence, and desktop support.

## Key Features to Implement
- Task CRUD with priorities, statuses, tags, due dates
- Project/app categorization (UI, Backend, API, Mobile, Infra)
- Auto link detection in descriptions and notes
- Dedicated Links tab to view all URLs
- File-based persistence (survives app restart)
- Export/import JSON backup
- Electron desktop builds (Mac & Windows)
- Multiple URLs per task

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React with TypeScript
- Backend: Node.js/Express
- Database: File-based JSON storage
- Desktop: Electron (Mac & Windows)

## Setup Progress
- [x] Project scaffolding initialized
- [ ] Frontend components implemented
- [ ] Backend API created
- [ ] File persistence logic
- [ ] Export/import functionality
- [ ] Electron packaging
- [ ] Desktop builds
